'''âw-l-l-th''' ('''kawallethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forecaddie|forecaddie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forecaddie|forecaddie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-l-l-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawallethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwalethoko|thiwalethoko]] || [[word:jiwalethoko|jiwalethoko]] || [[word:shiwalethoko|shiwalethoko]] || [[word:kiwalethoko|kiwalethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwalethoko|thuthuwalethoko]] || [[word:jujuwalethoko|jujuwalethoko]] || [[word:shushuwalethoko|shushuwalethoko]] || [[word:kukuwalethoko|kukuwalethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwalethoko|thĂŠwalethoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwalethoko|jĂŠwalethoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwalethoko|shĂŠwalethoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwalethoko|kĂŠwalethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawalethoko|thawalethoko]] || [[word:jawalethoko|jawalethoko]] || [[word:shawalethoko|shawalethoko]] || [[word:kawalethoko|kawalethoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
